content:
Currently when editing a covenant set, the covenants show as unfiltered, which makes it inconvenient if I'm just min maxing or picking between other covenant pieces of  the same set, thus place an autofilter.

2nd image shows what I'd expect to see when editing this covenant set
thread_title: ✅「Answered」When editing a covenant plan, automatically filter to that covenant set

content:
Feedback/Suggestion from a new player (on PC) that is loving the game ❤️

It's mostly **Quality of Life** suggestion:

-Add an option to remove the confirmation from **ultra: annihilation** and **caro: furnace** (or add it to the option that remove confirmation of exalt and posses)

-When you **select a card** ( for example orison, rouse, skills that draw selected cards from the draw pile or even when upgrading a skill) the description of the card always appear and you have to click a second time before being able to confirm or to do anything else, it's really annoying. An option to only show card description if you click a second time on it (or maybe only if you  hold or right click it) would be really nice!!
(For example right now when selecting a rouse on arc1 it's really really not fluid/smooth, you click on the rouse you want, you click again to remove the description, you click on confirm, and you click again because it show you the rouse description a final time)

-It would be nice if card with **Retain** had something to easily see they stay in hand, something like a special effect, the card being slightly different or an icon to instantly see which card have it

-Same thing for **Fleeting**, something to clearly see the card will be destroyed at end of turn would be cool

-With **Kath's card** it's a bit hard for me to see the difference between a fiamma 1 and fiamma 2 card, more difference between them or something like a little number on top or next to the cost of the card would me nice

When i play H4-10 and want to retry battle to play more optimize (without the new turn rewind that locks behind battle pass) i have to wait like 2-3 mins just for the story that I've watch dozens of times. Please make it skippable! PLEASE <:please:1356053110375714817> <:please:1356053110375714817> <:please:1356053110375714817>
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Please make final boss ch4 astral reign story skippable

content: In the Arc2 4-10 fight, if you kill the small fish (not only with the exalt) in the back, the bleed stacks visual will not go down when you heal, but mechanically they are removed.

又是我，又有錯字了，我猜測這裡原句子是：「朵爾」被困在「了」如今這具軀殼中。那为啥会变成「瞭」呢？因为在简体中「了liao3」解与干嘛「了 le1」的字是同一个，所以直接翻译就会出现「了liao1」变成「瞭 liao3」的状况。有一說一，不如直接请我帮你们校繁中稿得了。
对了，还有个问题要注意，「後」跟「后」要注意，並不是所有的「后」都能直接翻譯成「後」，「王后」與「王後」是两码字事，一个是王的后边，一个是王的老婆。
ps. 这个「了」有点冗言赘字，删了不影响语意。
基本上有事没事的更新都会出这种问题，或者显示100%但是还没下完或者干脆0/0，到底怎么回事
之前說移除超驗存在後獎勵會以最高級與每日試訓合併，但實際上凝晶產出的升級材料也好調查徽章也好我都找不不到去哪裡取得，不排除是我太沒找到所以來問問看有沒有人知道他們被合併到哪裡去了⋯⋯？
thread_title: 原本超驗存在每週產出的調查徽章和技能材料現在可以去哪裡補？
